{{SCHOOL_NAME}}: Name of the school or institution
{{SCHOOL_TYPE}}: Type of school, for example Private School, Public School, Academy, Training Center
{{LOGO_OR_INITIALS}}: School logo image HTML or fallback initials text / span
{{CYCLES}}: Cycles, levels, or target school stages
{{CLASS_COUNT}}: Number of classes, branches, or training tracks
{{PROGRAMS_SECTION}}: HTML/text block for programs, cycles, or formations
{{PAYMENT_ONLINE_INFO}}: Online payment information or badge HTML
